primary_use_case: LT2 fallback binary; lowest delay fragility of E0-class
rationale_short: Least delay-fragile binary. Inferior raw Sharpe to E5/E0_plus/E5_plus but most resilient under degraded latency.

primary_use_case: LT2 alternative when robust ATR is preferred
rationale_short: Beats E0 at all cost levels. LT2 fallback for E5_plus. WFO 4/8 (marginal).
Best vol-target representative. Operationally robust at all latency tiers. Low CAGR acceptable under M3.

excluded_reason: Near-duplicate of SM with higher complexity and zero measurable benefit
rationale_short: Hysteresis mechanism adds ~5 params with identical trade structure and replay fragility vs SM.
Only strategy to pass ALL Tier 1 gates. WFO 6/8 (best). Most defensible binary for deployment.
Highest raw Sharpe (1.430). Requires strict LT1. Performance evaporates beyond D2 delay.
